title: 2013 Widnes Vikings season
wikitext:
{{Short description|Rugby league team season}} {{Use dmy dates|date=April 2022}} {{unreferenced|date=September 2017}} In the 2013 [[rugby league]] season, the English club [[Widnes Vikings]] won 6 of their matches in the [[Super League]], drew 2 and lost 12. ==Pre-season friendlies== {{rugbyleaguebox | bg = #ffdddd | date = 26 December 2012
